info:
# Run Once
## Initalize Hardware
 1. Initialize Global Variables
 2. Initialize Connected Hardware
    -  LabJack T7
    -  Siglent Power Supply

# Run Each Test
## Prompt User for Serial Number & DUT Installed
1. Prompt user to scan Serial Number
2. Instruct user to insert DUT
    - Prompt will disapear once DUT is installed top is closed and OK is pressed

## Voltage Tests
1. Turn on Power Supply

rules.to: {"title":"PCB Serial Number","content":"Please Scan or Enter Serial Number","okText":"OK","cancelText":"Cancel","textLabel":"Serial Number"}

name: Functional Test Start
info:
- This is the start of the functional test section
- This will be run for each DUT that is tested

name: Prompt User for Serial Number & DUT Install
info:
## Serial Number Prompt
- If S/N is entered and OK pressed add to global.serial_num
- If no S/N and OK pressed or Cancel pressed, then do not save any of the results

## Insert DUT Prompt
- Wait for DUT to be inserted and fixture top closed before OK button is available
- If Cancel is pressed, return to Serial Number Prompt
